LanguageData.UB_SNS_NOTHATISNOTSOLIDSNAKE.title: RIM operative
LanguageData.UB_SNS_NOTHATISNOTSOLIDSNAKE.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained by a Glitterworld government agency on infiltration and espionage. [PAWN_pronoun] was deployed in cramped Urbworlds and dense jungle Deathworlds, tasked with infiltrating and dismantling hostile terrorist organizations and escaping without a trace. [PAWN_nameDef] preformed so well, [PAWN_pronoun] was specially chosen to be trained in reconnaissance, infiltration, and manipulation tactics. Their promotion to a R.I.M. Operative meant surviving months, even years, behind enemy lines on far-off rimworlds, with little to no support from their organization.
